description: §22.4.2 E-META-008 — `reflect()` called outside any `^{}` meta block. `User` is a declared struct (so this is NOT E-META-003 unknown-type), but the `reflect(User)` call sits in a `${}` logic body, not a `^{}` block; §22.4.2 rule 4: a `reflect(expr)` call outside any `^{}` block SHALL be E-META-008. Incidental W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset matching.
